homepage.heroSubline: Durable, custom fences built to withstand the California climate. Serving Los Angeles County with quality craftsmanship.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Rooted in Long Beach
aboutText: Innovative Fence, Inc. started with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach residents with fences that not only look great but also stand the test of time. Founded by a Long Beach native, we understand the unique challenges our coastal climate presents, from intense sun to occasional flooding.

We approach every project with a commitment to quality, using only the best materials and proven techniques. Our team takes pride in delivering exceptional results, whether it's a small repair or a complete fence installation. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations.

As a local business, we're deeply invested in the Long Beach community. We support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible neighbor. When you choose Innovative Fence, you're not just getting a fence; you're supporting a business that cares about its community.

valueProps.title: Climate-Resistant Materials
valueProps.description: We select materials specifically for Long Beach's weather, ensuring longevity and minimal maintenance.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: From classic Craftsman to modern styles, we tailor every fence to complement your home's architecture.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled team ensures precise installation for maximum stability and performance.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, detailed quotes with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what to expect.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free estimate for your custom fence project in Long Beach and surrounding areas.

services.name: Wood Fences
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences, customized for Long Beach properties.
services.description:
Wood fences offer timeless appeal and natural beauty, making them a popular choice for Long Beach homeowners. At Innovative Fence, Inc., we specialize in building wood fences that are both aesthetically pleasing and durable enough to withstand the California climate. We offer a variety of wood types, including redwood, cedar, and pressure-treated pine, each selected for its resistance to rot, insects, and the damaging effects of UV rays. 

Our wood fence options range from traditional picket fences to privacy fences and decorative designs. We work closely with you to create a custom design that complements your home's architecture and meets your specific needs. Whether you're looking to enhance your property's curb appeal or create a secure backyard space, our wood fences provide a versatile and attractive solution. 

We understand the importance of proper installation, especially in an area prone to earthquakes and strong Santa Ana winds. Our experienced installers use proven techniques to ensure your wood fence is securely anchored and built to last. We also offer staining and sealing services to protect your fence from the elements and maintain its beauty for years to come.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and create a custom design.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the best wood for your budget and aesthetic preferences.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our skilled team ensures precise and secure installation.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We offer staining and sealing to protect your fence.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for a fence in Long Beach?
faq.answer: Redwood and cedar are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to rot and insects. Pressure-treated pine is also a good option for its affordability and durability.

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my wood fence?
faq.answer: We recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements and maintain its appearance.

faq.question: Can you match my existing fence style?
faq.answer: Yes, we can create a custom wood fence that matches your existing fence style and complements your home's architecture.

services.name: Vinyl Fences
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences for Long Beach's busy homeowners.
services.description:
Vinyl fences are a practical and attractive option for homeowners in Long Beach who want a durable, low-maintenance fencing solution. Unlike wood, vinyl fences won't rot, warp, or splinter, and they never need painting or staining. This makes them an ideal choice for our coastal climate, where intense sun and occasional moisture can take a toll on traditional materials.

Innovative Fence, Inc. offers a wide variety of vinyl fence styles, from classic picket fences to privacy fences and decorative designs. We use high-quality vinyl that is UV-resistant, ensuring it won't fade or discolor over time. Our vinyl fences are also impact-resistant, capable of withstanding strong winds and everyday wear and tear.

Installation is crucial for vinyl fences to perform optimally. Our experienced team ensures precise installation, paying close attention to post depth and alignment. We also offer a range of color options to match your home's exterior and landscaping. With a vinyl fence from Innovative Fence, Inc., you can enjoy a beautiful, long-lasting fence without the hassle of constant maintenance.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – We evaluate your property and discuss your fencing needs.
Step 2: Design and Selection – We help you choose the perfect vinyl fence style and color.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team ensures precise and secure installation.
Step 4: Final Inspection – We conduct a thorough inspection to ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: How long will a vinyl fence last?
faq.answer: A high-quality vinyl fence can last 20-30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Can vinyl fences withstand strong winds?
faq.answer: Yes, our vinyl fences are designed to withstand strong winds and are installed with proper post depth and spacing for added stability.

faq.question: Do vinyl fences come with a warranty?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our vinyl fences to protect against defects in materials and workmanship.

services.name: Chain Link Fences
services.shortDescription: Affordable and secure chain link fences for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Chain link fences are a cost-effective and practical fencing solution for both residential and commercial properties in Long Beach. Known for their durability and security, chain link fences provide a reliable barrier without obstructing views. Innovative Fence, Inc. offers a variety of chain link fence options, including galvanized steel and vinyl-coated chain link, to meet your specific needs.

Our chain link fences are ideal for securing yards, protecting pets, and creating boundaries around commercial properties. We offer different heights and gauges to suit your security requirements. Vinyl-coated chain link provides added protection against rust and corrosion, making it a great choice for our coastal environment.

We take pride in our professional installation services, ensuring your chain link fence is properly installed and securely anchored. We also offer gate installation and repair services to complete your fencing project. Whether you need a simple backyard fence or a high-security perimeter fence, Innovative Fence, Inc. can provide a chain link solution that meets your budget and needs.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation – We assess your property and determine the best chain link fence solution.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right gauge and coating for your needs.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team ensures precise and secure installation.
Step 4: Gate Installation – We install gates to provide convenient access to your property.

faq.question: What is the difference between galvanized and vinyl-coated chain link?
faq.answer: Galvanized chain link is coated with zinc to prevent rust, while vinyl-coated chain link has an added layer of vinyl for enhanced protection and aesthetics.

faq.question: How high should my chain link fence be for security?
faq.answer: A 6-foot or 8-foot chain link fence is typically recommended for security purposes.

faq.question: Can you install a chain link fence on uneven terrain?
faq.answer: Yes, our experienced installers can adapt to uneven terrain and ensure your chain link fence is properly installed.

services.name: Aluminum Fences
services.shortDescription: Elegant and rust-proof aluminum fences for Long Beach homes.
services.description:
Aluminum fences offer a sophisticated and low-maintenance fencing solution for Long Beach homeowners. Known for their elegant appearance and rust-proof properties, aluminum fences provide a long-lasting and attractive barrier for your property. Innovative Fence, Inc. specializes in designing and installing custom aluminum fences that complement your home's architecture and enhance its curb appeal.

Our aluminum fences are available in a variety of styles, from classic ornamental designs to modern minimalist styles. We use high-quality aluminum that is powder-coated for added durability and resistance to the elements. Aluminum fences are ideal for pool enclosures, garden borders, and perimeter fencing.

We understand the importance of proper installation, especially in an area with occasional seismic activity. Our experienced team ensures your aluminum fence is securely anchored and built to withstand the elements. We also offer a range of color options to match your home's exterior and landscaping. With an aluminum fence from Innovative Fence, Inc., you can enjoy a beautiful, long-lasting fence without the hassle of constant maintenance.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your aesthetic preferences and fencing needs.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the perfect aluminum fence style and color.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team ensures precise and secure installation.
Step 4: Final Inspection – We conduct a thorough inspection to ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: Will an aluminum fence rust?
faq.answer: No, aluminum is naturally rust-proof, making it an ideal choice for coastal environments.

faq.question: Can aluminum fences be used for pool enclosures?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fences are a popular choice for pool enclosures due to their durability and aesthetic appeal.

faq.question: Do aluminum fences require painting?
faq.answer: No, aluminum fences are powder-coated for long-lasting color and require no painting.

services.name: Fence Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable fence repair services in Long Beach and surrounding areas.
services.description:
Even the most durable fences can suffer damage from weather, accidents, or wear and tear. Innovative Fence, Inc. offers fast and reliable fence repair services in Long Beach and surrounding areas. Whether you have a broken post, a damaged panel, or a gate that won't close, our experienced team can quickly diagnose the problem and provide effective solutions.

We repair all types of fences, including wood, vinyl, chain link, and aluminum. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your fence is restored to its original condition. We understand the importance of a secure and functional fence, so we respond quickly to repair requests and work efficiently to minimize disruption to your property.

From minor repairs to major overhauls, Innovative Fence, Inc. is your trusted source for fence repair services. We offer competitive pricing and transparent estimates, so you know exactly what to expect. Don't let a damaged fence compromise your security or curb appeal – contact us today for fast and reliable fence repair.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – We inspect your fence and identify the extent of the damage.
Step 2: Repair Plan – We develop a repair plan and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: Material Procurement – We source high-quality materials for the repair.
Step 4: Expert Repair – Our skilled team performs the necessary repairs.

faq.question: Do you repair all types of fences?
faq.answer: Yes, we repair wood, vinyl, chain link, and aluminum fences.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a repair request?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to repair requests within 24-48 hours.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for urgent situations.

services.name: Gate Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gate installation services in Long Beach.
services.description:
A well-designed and properly installed gate is essential for providing secure access to your property. Innovative Fence, Inc. offers professional gate installation services in Long Beach, specializing in a variety of gate styles and materials to meet your specific needs. Whether you need a simple pedestrian gate or a sophisticated automatic gate, we can provide a solution that enhances your property's security and curb appeal.

We install all types of gates, including wood gates, vinyl gates, chain link gates, and aluminum gates. We offer custom designs to match your fence style and enhance your property's aesthetics. Our experienced team ensures precise installation, paying close attention to alignment, hardware, and security features.

For added convenience and security, we also offer automatic gate installation services. We can install a variety of automatic gate operators, including swing gates, slide gates, and barrier gates. Our automatic gates are equipped with safety features and can be controlled with remote controls, keypads, or smartphone apps. With a gate from Innovative Fence, Inc., you can enjoy secure and convenient access to your property.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your gate needs and design preferences.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right gate material and style.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our team ensures precise and secure installation.
Step 4: Automation Options – We offer automatic gate installation and integration.

faq.question: What types of gates do you install?
faq.answer: We install wood gates, vinyl gates, chain link gates, and aluminum gates.

faq.question: Do you install automatic gates?
faq.answer: Yes, we install a variety of automatic gate operators.

faq.question: Can you match my existing fence style?
faq.answer: Yes, we can create a custom gate that matches your existing fence style.

serviceAreas.content:
Innovative Fence, Inc. is proud to offer our comprehensive fencing services to the residents and businesses of Los Angeles. From the iconic architecture of the 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival homes to modern constructions, we understand the unique aesthetic and security needs of this vibrant city. We are committed to providing high-quality fence installation and repair services that complement the diverse architectural styles found throughout Los Angeles. 

Our team has extensive experience working in Los Angeles, navigating the city's specific permitting requirements and understanding the local climate. We offer a wide range of fencing options, including wood, vinyl, chain link, and wrought iron, ensuring we can find the perfect solution for your property. Whether you need a secure perimeter for your home, a stylish fence for your business, or a durable fence for your commercial property, Innovative Fence, Inc. is here to serve you.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles, with its warm, dry climate year-round and diverse architectural landscape, presents unique fencing challenges and opportunities.

serviceAreas.content:
Innovative Fence, Inc. is dedicated to providing exceptional fencing services to the Pasadena community. Known for its beautiful 1910s-30s Craftsman bungalows and historic charm, Pasadena requires a fencing contractor that understands the architectural integrity of the area. We specialize in fences that enhance the character of these homes while providing security and privacy.

We offer a variety of fencing styles to complement the Craftsman aesthetic, including wood fences with detailed trim, wrought iron fences with intricate designs, and vinyl fences that mimic the look of wood with added durability. Our team is experienced in working within Pasadena's specific building codes and regulations, ensuring a smooth and stress-free installation process. Let Innovative Fence, Inc. help you create a beautiful and functional outdoor space that complements your Pasadena home.
serviceAreas.localContext: Pasadena's blend of historic Craftsman architecture and warm, dry climate makes it crucial to choose fencing materials and styles that are both aesthetically pleasing and durable.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Innovative Fence did an amazing job installing our new redwood fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! It really enhances our property. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our chain link fence was damaged in a recent storm, and Innovative Fence came out quickly to repair it. They were able to fix it at a reasonable price, and now our yard is secure again. Great service!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We are so happy with our new vinyl fence! It looks great and requires no maintenance which is exactly what we wanted. The installation team was friendly and professional. Thanks, Innovative Fence!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Our gate was sagging and difficult to open. Innovative Fence fixed it quickly and efficiently. Now it swings smoothly and closes securely. Excellent workmanship!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: We chose an aluminum fence for our pool area, and Innovative Fence did a fantastic job. The fence is beautiful and provides the safety we need. The team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: From start to finish, the experience with Innovative Fence was seamless. They helped us design a fence that perfectly complements our Craftsman home in Belmont Shore. The quality of the materials and workmanship is outstanding.
